summary: New builder skill `connect-cockpit`. Branche une marque au dashboard cockpit Abyss via POST /api/operator/onboard-brand server-side. Provisionne Airbyte sources + Supabase rows pour 6 platforms (Shopify, Meta, TikTok, Snap, GA4, Google Ads bloque dev token). Subflow guided one-question-per-turn, runs apres setup-brand, complementaire a onboard-brand.
